headline: Fortinet (FTNT) Is Up 5.9% After Beat‑and‑Raise Q4 and 2026 Billings Outlook - What's Changed
summary: In recent days, Fortinet reported Q4 earnings per share of US$0.81 on revenue of US$1.91 billion, both ahead of analyst forecasts, and outlined a fiscal 2026 billings growth outlook of 13% year over year with continued momentum in Secure Access Service Edge (SASE). Alongside these results, analyst coverage, short‑interest data and a planned March 10, 2026 investor briefing point to shifting sentiment as the market reassesses Fortinet’s growth and competitive position in cybersecurity. We’ll...

headline: Fortinet Earnings Beat Sparks Fresh Look At Valuation And SASE Growth
summary: Fortinet reported stronger than expected fourth quarter results, with revenue and earnings per share coming in ahead of earlier expectations. The company highlighted robust demand across its cybersecurity services and positive billings growth guidance. Fortinet reiterated its focus on Secure Access Service Edge, underlining its position in this segment of the cybersecurity market. For investors watching NasdaqGS:FTNT, the latest report adds fresh detail to the story around Fortinet at a...
